{{Quote|Good to have you here, soldier. I hope you came prepared to fight. The Empire is calling in their Dark Troopers from around the galaxy. We need to make sure they never get here. If you can thin out their numbers by 5 before they even get to Restuss, it will be a big blow to the Imperial army.|Lieutenant Olvog|<ref name="SWG:SK">{{GalaxiesNGE}}</ref>}}
'''Olvog''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He participated in the [[Battle of Restuss]] in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Olvog was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].
